list.name: model
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT model FROM (SELECT model FROM llm_gateway.request_log WHERE model != '' UNION ALL SELECT model FROM llm_gateway.usage_log WHERE model != '') ORDER BY model

list.name: api_key
list.label: Client API Key
list.query: SELECT k AS __text, k AS __value FROM (SELECT DISTINCT coalesce(nullIf(key_id,''), nullIf(api_key_id,''), 'unknown') AS k FROM llm_gateway.request_log) ORDER BY k

targets.rawSql:
WITH ranked AS (
    SELECT
        coalesce(nullIf(key_id,''), nullIf(api_key_id,''), 'unknown') AS client,
        toInt64(sum(total_tokens)) AS total_tok,
        sum(cost) AS total_cost
    FROM llm_gateway.usage_log
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
      AND coalesce(nullIf(key_id,''), nullIf(api_key_id,''), 'unknown') IN (${api_key:singlequote})
      AND model IN (${model:singlequote})
    GROUP BY client
    ORDER BY total_cost DESC
    LIMIT 100
)
SELECT
    concat(toString(row_number() OVER ()), '. ', client) AS name_str,
    concat(
        multiIf(
            total_tok >= 1000000, concat(toString(round(total_tok / 1000000)), ' Mil'),
            total_tok >= 1000, concat(toString(round(total_tok / 1000)), ' K'),
            toString(total_tok)
        ),
        ' ($', toString(round(total_cost, 2)), ')'
    ) AS value_str,
    multiIf(
        row_number() OVER () = 1, '#C9A44C',
        row_number() OVER () = 2, '#A8A9AD',
        row_number() OVER () = 3, '#B07A3C',
        '#FFFFFF'
    ) AS Color
FROM ranked
LIMIT 10

WITH ranked AS (
    SELECT
        model AS model_name,
        toInt64(sum(total_tokens)) AS total_tok,
        sum(cost) AS total_cost
    FROM llm_gateway.usage_log
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)
      AND model != ''
      AND coalesce(nullIf(key_id,''), nullIf(api_key_id,''), 'unknown') IN (${api_key:singlequote})
      AND model IN (${model:singlequote})
    GROUP BY model_name
    ORDER BY total_cost DESC
    LIMIT 100
)
SELECT
    concat(toString(row_number() OVER ()), '. ', model_name) AS name_str,
    concat(
        multiIf(
            total_tok >= 1000000, concat(toString(round(total_tok / 1000000)), ' Mil'),
            total_tok >= 1000, concat(toString(round(total_tok / 1000)), ' K'),
            toString(total_tok)
        ),
        ' ($', toString(round(total_cost, 2)), ')'
    ) AS value_str,
    multiIf(
        row_number() OVER () = 1, '#C9A44C',
        row_number() OVER () = 2, '#A8A9AD',
        row_number() OVER () = 3, '#B07A3C',
        '#FFFFFF'
    ) AS Color
FROM ranked
LIMIT 10
